chunks.scheme_name: HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth
chunks.text: Stamp duty on investment: 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020). If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.
